description: 187 - 17-04-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Richard Moore (former Chief of the Secret Intelligence Service)
text:
the Secret Intelligence Service)

From: Peter Mandelson[ Personal
Sent: Thur 17/04/2025 1:43:39 AM (UTC)

To: Richard Moore[ Personal ]
Subject: Re: Letter from America

Thanks

Get Outlook for iOS

From: Richard Moore

Sent: Wednesday, April 16, 2025 9:35:07 PM
To: Peter Mandelson

Subject: Re: Letter from America

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Peter,
Really helpful. Do add me to the regular distribution if you feel able. Great to have this feel.

You should assume *** could access them (and having hacked

they could choose to leak them to embarrass HMG). You might be better sending them in on
ek
at SECRET.
Richard
Sent from Outlook for i0S

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: Wednesday, April 16, 2025 8:58:45 PM
To: Richard Moore
Subject: FW: Letter from America

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Fyi last week’s missive.
4eK

538,

Peter
Lord Mandelson
HM Ambassador, Washington DC

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Personal

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
